params.name: CCD
params.description:
On Nov 24, 1997 AD, the first Conference of the Parties to Combat Desertification was held.
With 197 contracting parties, the Convention to Combat Desertification is one of the three major environmental conventions under the framework of the United Nations Conference on Environment and Development. The convention's main goal is for governments to work together to develop action plans to combat desertification in collaboration with donors, local communities, and non-governmental organizations.
